system.name: Autonomous AI Agent System
system.description: Complete multi-agent system for full-stack development automation

orchestrator_agent.role: Central coordinator and task manager for all agents
orchestrator_agent.description: Manages workflow execution, task assignment, dependency resolution, agent supervision, and conflict resolution
core_responsibilities: Assign tasks to agents based on skills and availability
Manage task dependencies and execution order
Monitor all agents for health and performance
Handle errors and implement recovery strategies
Enforce quality gates and approval workflows

workflow_orchestration.description: Expert in creating, scheduling, and managing complex workflows
capabilities: Handle parallel and sequential task execution

dependency_management.description: Expert in resolving and managing task dependencies

agent_supervision.description: Expert in monitoring and managing agent behavior

conflict_resolution.description: Advanced in resolving conflicts between agents

actions.description: Create and initialize a new workflow with tasks and dependencies
Assign a task to the most suitable agent based on skills and current load
Check health status and performance metrics of all agents
Check and verify if task dependencies are met before execution
Resolve conflicts when multiple agents attempt to access same resource
Generate comprehensive system status and performance report

include_sections.description: agent_performance, task_metrics, workflow_status, resource_usage, errors, alerts

actions.description: Scale agent resources (CPU, RAM) based on workload
Implement recovery strategies when agents or tasks fail

event_handlers.handler: Validate task, check dependencies, assign to agent
Update task status, notify agent, start monitoring
Log start time, update metrics, emit progress event
Verify completion, update metrics, trigger dependent tasks
Log failure, implement recovery, reassign or escalate
Scale resources, queue new tasks, notify orchestrator
Increase priority, allocate more resources, notify stakeholders

networking.outbound_requirements: All agents, message brokers, external APIs

specialist_agents.description: Creates responsive UI components, pages, and integrates frontend with backend APIs
core_responsibilities: Create responsive pages with Tailwind CSS
Generate hero sections and promotional content

actions.description: Build reusable React component with props, state, and styling
Build a complete page with multiple components and routing
Connect frontend component to backend API endpoint
Create hero banner with image, text, and CTA buttons
Build product grid/list with filtering, sorting, and pagination
Create form with validation and submission handling
Implement code splitting, lazy loading, and caching

specialist_agents.description: Designs database schemas, creates RESTful APIs, implements business logic and authentication

actions.description: Design and create database tables with relationships
Build FastAPI endpoint with validation and documentation
Setup JWT/OAuth2 authentication with login and registration
Generate CRUD endpoints for an entity
Create data validation schemas and error handling
Analyze and optimize slow database queries
Implement Redis caching for performance

specialist_agents.description: Manages Git repository, branching, merging, CI/CD pipelines, and deployments

actions.description: Create new branch for feature development
Commit code with proper message and formatting
Create PR with description and linking
Automatically resolve or guide resolution of conflicts
Create or update GitHub Actions workflow
Deploy code to specified environment
Rollback to previous version

specialist_agents.role: Product data management and catalog operations
specialist_agents.description: Manages product data, CRUD operations, pricing, inventory, and images

actions.description: Add new product to catalog
Modify existing product
Remove product from catalog
Update stock levels

specialist_agents.description: Builds admin dashboard, user management, analytics, and reporting

actions.description: Build main admin dashboard with KPIs
Create user listing and permission management

specialist_agents.description: Builds user dashboard, profile management, order tracking

actions.description: Create personalized user dashboard

specialist_agents.description: Implements OAuth, JWT, RBAC, encryption, and security policies

actions.description: Setup login/register/logout authentication
Implement role-based access control
Setup data encryption and password hashing

specialist_agents.description: Handles email, SMS, push notifications, and webhooks

actions.description: Send email to user or admin
Send SMS alert
Trigger external webhook

specialist_agents.description: Monitors all agents, verifies code quality, runs tests, and reports issues

actions.description: Check health status of all agents
Execute unit, integration, and E2E tests
Analyze code for quality issues
Check performance metrics
Create comprehensive system report

workflow_templates.description: Complete workflow for developing a new feature

workflow_templates.description: Workflow for launching a new product

workflow_templates.description: Scheduled daily monitoring and health checks

quality_gates.pass_criteria: All required checks pass + code review approved
